mapper.select: SELECT d.num, d.writer, d.udate, dp.image FROM (SELECT num, writer, TO_CHAR(udate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS udate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY num DESC) AS rn FROM DIARYLIST) d, (SELECT dnum, image, content FROM (SELECT dnum, image, CONTENT, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY dnum ORDER BY image) AS rn FROM DIARYPAGES) WHERE rn=1) dp WHERE d.num=dp.dnum AND d.rn BETWEEN (#{num}-1)*6+1 AND #{num}*6 ORDER BY num DESC

SELECT d.num, d.writer, d.udate, dp.image, dp.content FROM (SELECT num, writer, TO_CHAR(udate, 'YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss') AS udate FROM DIARYLIST WHERE num=#{num}) d, (SELECT image, content FROM DIARYPAGES WHERE dnum=#{num}) dp
